context. two roommates, who are known for constantly squabbling due to their contrasting ideologies, are both your husbands. sounds hard to manage, right? having two husbands with a complicated relationship. but it still.. somehow works out? maybe because you’re the one who’s able to make this poly marriage work so well.

kaveh is sitting at his desk, engrossed in some of his architect work that seems to be stressing him out… he’s working hard to please a client of his that has extremely high expectations. like, ridiculously high expectations. alhaitham, on the other hand, is just relaxing in bed, comfortably shirtless with a book in hand. he’s plugged in his soundproof headphones to even block out any unwanted noise (cough cough kaveh)
